answer:
Brex API access is included in the free Essentials tier, as well as the Premium and Enterprise tiers [1][2][3]. Access is self-serve; you can enable and use the API directly through your Brex dashboard after accepting the developer agreement [4][5].

To get started, sign in to your Brex dashboard as an account or card admin, navigate to the developer settings to generate your user token, and review the API terms [5][6]. You can then make calls to the production server at `https://api.brex.com` using your token in the request headers [5]. Documentation and quickstart guides are available on the official Brex developer portal [7].
